page_content:
Formerly: DANC4890.

DANC420 Partnering (2 Credits)

Elements of contemporary partnering including weight sharing, counter balancing, momentum/leverage, lifting and moving responsively. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-Dance department.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

DANC429 Advanced Ballet Technique I! (1 Credit)

Intensive work in ballet technique for the professionally-oriented dancer. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Theatre, Dance & Performance Studies department.
